item.title: RichCimini: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 6min If there’s anyone who knows what it’s like to be sitting on a gold mine of draft picks, i
item.description: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 6min If there’s anyone who knows what it’s like to be sitting on a gold mine of draft picks, it’s Jimmy Johnson. So I called the #Cowboys legend to discuss the #Jets situation. Some fascinating insights. De espn.com 1 2 6 2 mil

item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 37min Haven’t taken much irt draft bets. Have some Tyson to Browns at 6 from Friday. Just took some Sid
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 37min Haven’t taken much irt draft bets. Have some Tyson to Browns at 6 from Friday. Just took some Siddiq to #8 (NO) on Kalshi and 20-1 on FD. There’s 25-1 on DK if u have access. Checks lot of the boxes that Loomis likes in the draft and they never take who most expect. All we know Mostrar más 4 12 3 mil

item.description: Aidan O’Sullivan @Sully_SportCast · 39min Spare Stand ticket for the big one in Thurles today (block 119) if anybody is stuck 86

item.title: RapSheet: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 41min About last night… Dexter Lawrence wakes up today as a member of the #Bengals with a huge
item.description:
Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 41min About last night… Dexter Lawrence wakes up today as a member of the #Bengals with a huge new contract extension coming to make him one of the NFL’s highest-paid D-linemen. Cita Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 12h #Giants star Dexter Lawrence is being traded to the #Bengals in a pre-Draft blockbuster that includes the No. 10 pick heading to the Giants, per me and @MikeGarafolo.
NYG gets premium draft compensation, Cincy gets a lynchpin, while Sexy Dexy gets a new, big-money extension. 76 107 779 171 mil
